introSection:
Kiddie Koasta is a kiddie roller coaster located at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK.

The ride was taken down around 2017 to allow for construction of a new building. It has since reopened on the roof of the building.
fullText:
Kiddie Koasta is a kiddie roller coaster located at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK.

The ride was taken down around 2017 to allow for construction of a new building. It has since reopened on the roof of the building.

The ride has a helix.
